title: Marketing & Growth Lead
description:
We are a small but fast-growing tuition centre in Singapore, built on strong academic outcomes and modern, content-driven student acquisition. As a lean and ambitious team, we move fast, experiment often, and expect real ownership. We are looking for a Marketing & Growth Lead who will own the end-to-end marketing and sales process, from campaign ideation to student conversion.

Role Overview

  • This is a high-ownership role. You will be responsible not just for creating content, but for designing, championing, and executing marketing campaigns that directly drive enrolments.
  • You will plan the full funnel — awareness, engagement, trial, conversion — and work closely with tutors to turn teaching content and TikTok Live sessions into real business growth.
  • This role is ideal for someone who thinks like a founder or growth operator, not a task-based marketer.

Key Responsibilities

End-to-End Marketing & Sales Ownership

  • Design and own the entire student acquisition funnel
  • Plan how leads are generated, nurtured, and converted into signups
  • Champion marketing campaigns from concept to execution and post-campaign review
  • Take responsibility for outcomes (e.g. enquiries, trial sign-ups, enrolments)

Marketing Strategy & Campaign Planning

  • Craft a clear, actionable marketing plan aligned with enrolment targets
  • Plan and launch specific campaigns (e.g. crash courses, exam-season pushes, TikTok Live series, free trial funnels)
  • Identify target segments (students vs parents, level-specific strategies)
  • Track performance metrics and continuously iterate

Content Creation & Social Media

  • Plan/design/shoot/edit/create short-form videos, images, captions, and posts
  • Manage posting schedules and content calendars
  • Repurpose TikTok Live content into clips for sustained reach
  • Ensure consistency in branding, messaging, and credibility

TikTok Live & Tutor-Led Marketing

  • Plan TikTok Live teaching and engagement strategies as a key growth channel
  • Guide tutors on structuring live lessons for engagement and conversion, communicating value clearly to students and parents, and handling basic sales messaging naturally during live sessions
  • Coordinate live schedules and coach tutors on basic on-screen presence and messaging


Beneficial Prior Experience

Candidates with experience in one or more of the following will be highly valued:

  • Marketing or growth roles in education, tuition, or enrichment centres
  • Running or scaling TikTok, Instagram, or short-form video accounts
  • Planning and executing lead-generation or conversion-focused campaigns
  • Creator-led marketing, influencer marketing, or live commerce
  • Early-stage startup or small business environments
  • Graphic design, video-editing for social media posts


Work Arrangement & Compensation

  • Part-time, flexible hours
  • Hybrid / remote-friendly (some in-person coordination required)
  • Highly competitive pay, with performance-based incentives
  • Clear path to expanded responsibility or full-time role as the centre scales
  • Candidates are required to commit for at least six months
